US strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean

President Donald Trump speaks during a Cabinet meeting at the White House, Wednesday, May 27, 2026, in Washington, as Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, looks on. (AP Photo/Jacquelyn Martin)2026-06-19T00:33:21Z WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. military attacked a boat accused of smuggling drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean on Thursday, killing three people, as the Trump administration wages a monthslong campaign against alleged traffickers in Latin America.The latest attack brings the number of people

corpus.title: US kills 3 in strike on alleged drug smuggling boat in Eastern Pacific
corpus.signal_text:
US kills 3 in strike on alleged drug smuggling boat in Eastern Pacific

The attack is the latest in a series of strikes on vessels operated by 'narco-terrorists,' according to Washington.

corpus.title: U.S. strike on boat in Pacific Ocean kills three
corpus.signal_text:
U.S. strike on boat in Pacific Ocean kills three

Latest attack brings number of people killed in boat strikes by U.S. military to at least 211

corpus.title: Pentágono ejecuta a 3 en otro ataque a lancha
corpus.signal_text:
Pentágono ejecuta a 3 en otro ataque a lancha

El ejército de Estados Unidos asesinó a tres personas ayer en un nuevo ataque “cinético letal” contra una embarcación señalada sin pruebas de participar en operaciones de narcotráfico en el océano Pacífico oriental, informó el Comando Sur en X junto con un video.

corpus.title: U.S. strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean
corpus.signal_text:
U.S. strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean

The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in early September.

corpus.title: US military says three killed in its strike on vessel in Eastern Pacific
corpus.signal_text:
US military says three killed in its strike on vessel in Eastern Pacific

WASHINGTON, June 18 - The U.S. military said on Thursday its strike on a vessel in the Eastern Pacific killed three males, marking the latest such attack that human rights groups call extrajudicial killings and Washington casts as targeting of \"narco-terrorists.\"

corpus.title: US strike on alleged smuggling boat kills three
corpus.signal_text:
US strike on alleged smuggling boat kills three

The United States launched a strike on a suspected drug-trafficking boat in the eastern Pacific Ocean on Thursday, killing three men on board, officials said. The post US strike on alleged smuggling boat kills three appeared first on Vanguard News.
